text: Insect attack - attacks with insects as a beam attack.
Scorpion Sting - poisons the closest entity to the player.
Wolf Pack - summons three tame wolves.
$(o)Condition:$() At least one tamed mob within 16 blocks.
Wolf Pack: +20% player damage, +90% tamed mob damage.
Turtle Shell: Damage from mobs/players reduced by 25%.
